seoTitle: Ob Flat vs Olary — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Ob Flat and Olary. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Ob Flat vs Olary: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Ob Flat and Olary.
heading: Ob Flat vs Olary — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Ob Flat, South Australia and Olary, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Olary has a lower overall climate risk score (33/100) compared to Ob Flat (37/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Ob Flat or Olary safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Ob Flat has a flood risk score of 51/100, while Olary scores 22/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Ob Flat scores 29/100 for bushfire risk. Olary scores 39/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Ob Flat or Olary?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Olary has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.98% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
